?? control/audits/query-privacy-poisoning-guard-v0/
fake_demand_spam_model: Classifies spam and repeated fake demand for aggregate exclusion, quarantine, and future throttling without runtime tracking.
source_stuffing_candidate_poisoning_mode: Classifies source stuffing and candidate poisoning before future probe/candidate creation without mutating sources or candidates.
private_data_detection_policy: Reject or redact private paths, secrets, credentials, IPs, account IDs, private URLs, local identifiers, and long sensitive text before public aggregation.
raw_query_retention_policy: Raw query retention default none; examples retain no unsafe raw query data.

remaining_blockers: Runtime guard implementation, persistence, deletion/export policy, and production abuse controls are future work.
Demand dashboard, source sync worker, and source cache/evidence ledger remain future contracts.
Hosted wrapper deployment, backend URL configuration, edge/rate limits, static-site verification, and Manual Observation Batch 0 remain human/operator parallel work.
notes: No telemetry, account/IP tracking, public query logging, query-intelligence mutation, index mutation, external calls, or live probes were added.
